Plan your safari
A day at Sabela

From first light to the last coal of the fire

Two drives a day, walks with armed guides, dinners under the stars and long, unhurried afternoons. Everything here is included — and nothing is rushed.

Plan your safari See the gallery
What you'll do

The experiences, all included

Twice-daily game drives

Open 4×4 drives at dawn and dusk with a ranger and tracker, off-road and unhurried, in search of the Big Five.

Walking safaris

Step down from the vehicle and read the bush on foot — tracks, dung, birdsong — with an armed senior guide.

Bush dining & the boma

Breakfasts in the riverbed, lantern-lit boma dinners and a cellar of the Cape's finest — wherever the day takes you.

Stargazing

Some of the darkest skies in the country, a resident astronomer on clear nights, and a sliding roof above your bed.

The bush spa

Treatments on your private deck through the heat of the afternoon, timed around the rhythm of the drives.

Conservation up close

Join the team on a rhino-monitoring morning or a visit to the community school your stay helps fund.

Out in the field

A few moments from the day

Build your perfect day

Tell us what you came for — leopards, long walks, big skies, or simply nowhere to be — and we'll shape the stay around it.

Check availability Talk to us
SSabela

An intimate, design-led safari lodge on a private Big Five reserve in the Greater Kruger.

From the bush

Sightings, seasons and the occasional special. Once a month, never more.
